title: LEGO Star Wars 75432 V-19 Torrent Starfighter Building Toy - 3 Minifigures incl. Obi Wan Kenobi & Asajj Ventress with Lightsabers - Gift for 9+ Year Old Boys & The Clone Wars Fans
features: LEGO Star Wars: The Clone Wars starfighter – Join a hero character on thrilling missions with this detailed V-19 Torrent Starfighter building toy for 9+ year old boys and girls
LEGO Star Wars starfighter – Features an opening cockpit, adjustable wings for flight and landing modes and 2 stud shooters for fantasy battle play
3 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Asajj Ventress with 2 red Lightsabers with curved hilts, General Obi-Wan Kenobi with a blue Lightsaber and a Clone Pilot with a blaster pistol
Ready for action – With this buildable Star Wars toy, kids can fold down the 3 wings and use the central wing underneath the starfighter as a handle to ‘fly' it
LEGO Star Wars gift idea for kids – This building set featuring a starship and iconic characters makes a great gift for 9+ year old boys and girls who are Star Wars: The Clone Wars fans
A fun way to build – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive building adventure where they can rotate a 3D digital version of their construction models as they build, and more
Explore the range – LEGO Star Wars sets (sold separately) enable kids and adult Star Wars fans to relive classic scenes, create new stories or simply display the buildable models
description: From the manufacturer Star Wars starfighter for fantasy battles Team up with General Obi-Wan Kenobi and swoosh into LEGO Star Wars: The Clone Wars action with the V-19 Torrent Starfighter. Unlimited ways to play This building toy features a cool vehicle and Star Wars: The Clone Wars characters to play out memorable scenes and create new stories. LEGO Star Wars V-19 Torrent Starfighter Flight and landing modes Adjust the wings for flight and landing. Designed for swooshing! Use the central wing as a handle for ‘flying’. 3 LEGO Star Wars minifigures Asajj Ventress, General Obi-Wan Kenobi and a Clone Pilot. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Star Wars fan gifts for LEGO lovers Discover a galaxy of fun building toys (sold separately) to excite kids and adult fans in the LEGO Star Wars range.
